overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus travels through urban residential streets, stopping at designated bus stops to pick up passengers. Rain streaks cover the windshield as wipers operate continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with apartment buildings

events.description: bus waits at red traffic light before proceeding
bus accelerates through intersection after light changes

agents.ego_description: operating the bus through wet city streets, navigating intersections with windshield wipers active

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on approaching from opposite direction

entered.detail: multi-story concrete residential buildings lining the street
rain-soaked road surface with reflections and puddles
wipers moving across the front glass clearing rain
digital navigation screen showing route information

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through a rain-soaked urban residential street with apartment buildings on both sides. Windshield wipers operate continuously to clear the heavy rain. The bus stops briefly at a traffic light before proceeding through the intersection, passing oncoming traffic with headlights illuminated.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop shelter on urban sidewalk

events.description: bus pulls over to the right and stops at designated bus stop
bus doors open and interior lights illuminate the entrance area

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop with doors open, waiting for passenger to board

notable_agents.action: passenger waiting at bus stop shelter boards the bus through front door

entered.detail: covered waiting area with glass panels and bench
bicycle locked to pole near the bus stop

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls over to a sheltered bus stop on the right side of the street. The doors open and a passenger boards from the sidewalk. The interior lighting becomes visible as the doors open, and a parked bicycle is seen near the stop.

events.description: bus accelerates away from bus stop and merges back into traffic lane
bus passes through intersection with yield sign visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating along wet road, navigating through residential area with parked vehicles on sides

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped warning sign above the road

segments.scene_description: The bus departs from the first stop and continues driving through a tree-lined urban street. The road features parked cars along the right side and apartment buildings on both sides. The bus passes through an intersection marked with warning signs while maintaining steady speed through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop adjacent to orange apartment building

events.description: bus slows and pulls over to second bus stop location
doors open and destination display changes to show next stop

agents.ego_description: stopped at second bus stop with doors open, allowing passenger to enter

notable_agents.action: passenger in blue pants waiting at shelter approaches and boards the bus

entered.detail: red and white striped barrier near the curb

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and stops at a second bus stop located next to an orange apartment building. A passenger boards from the sheltered waiting area. Construction barriers are visible on the left side of the road near the stop, and the bus interior lighting illuminates as the doors open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin navigating a rain-drenched urban residential neighborhood through a series of passenger pickups. It begins by driving through heavy rain past apartment buildings, with windshield wipers operating continuously as the bus pauses at a traffic light and passes oncoming headlights. As the bus pulls over to a sheltered stop, the doors open to allow a passenger to board, momentarily revealing the interior lighting and a parked bicycle on the sidewalk. The scene then shifts back to the road, gliding through a tree-lined street past parked cars and warning signs before approaching a second stop. Finally, the bus comes to a halt beside an orange apartment building and construction barriers, where the interior lights glow once more as another passenger enters from the shelter.
